testsuite.name: com.TTT.Debug.SplitterTracingTest
testsuite.system-out: 🎯 Splitter completed with 1 results ✅ Pipeline AnalysisPipeline2 completed: Validated analysis input... ✅ Pipeline SummaryPipeline1 completed: Extracted key points... ✅ Pipeline AnalysisPipeline1 completed: Analysis result from engine... 🎯 Splitter completed with 3 results 📊 Actual results count: 3 🔍 Comprehensive trace report: /home/cage/Desktop/Workspaces/TPipe/TPipe/splitter_comprehensive_trace.html 📊 Shows 3 pipeline results across multiple keys
